data.title: a16z-backed Entropy shuts down, promises investors refunds
data.description:
Entropy, the cryptocurrency custody startup that raised $25 million from Andreessen Horowitz and other prominent venture capital firms, is shutting down operations after four years and will return remaining capital to investors, its founder announced on X. Tux Pacific, the company’s founder and CEO, said that the decision followed several business pivots and two rounds […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/entropy-shuts-down-promises-refunds/

data.title: Monero Slips Toward $450 After Sharp Breakdown From $700 Zone
data.description:
Monero is trading under sustained pressure after a steep multi-day decline erased a large portion of its January gains. The asset is currently changing hands around $447–$450, marking a deep pullback from levels above $700 earlier in the month and confirming a clear bearish structure on the 4-hour timeframe.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/monero-slips-toward-450-after-sharp-breakdown-from-700-zone/

data.title: Canada Decides Against Free Trade Agreement with China
data.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has declared that Canada will not seek a free trade agreement with China. According to NS3.AI, this decision comes in response to U.S. President Donald Trump's warning of imposing 100% tariffs on Canadian goods if such an agreement were to be pursued. This move highlights the persistent geopolitical tensions affecting global trade dynamics.

data.title: Strive Asset Manager Enhances Financial Structure with New Stock Issuance
data.description: Strive Asset Manager has replaced its convertible bonds with floating-rate perpetual preferred stock to strengthen its financial framework. According to NS3.AI, this move aims to improve leverage ratios by reclassifying debt as equity, providing creditors with high dividends and priority over common stockholders. This strategic shift could serve as a model for companies like Strategy (MSTR) that are dealing with significant convertible debt challenges.

data.title: Son of U.S. Contractor Accused of $40 Million Cryptocurrency Theft
data.description: John Daghita, the son of a head of a U.S. government contractor, faces allegations of stealing over $40 million in cryptocurrency from wallets linked to government seizures. According to NS3.AI, the theft was facilitated through insider access at CMDSS, an IT firm with federal contracts responsible for managing seized digital assets. This incident highlights significant concerns regarding insider threats and the management of government-held cryptocurrency assets as investigations continue.

data.title: Canada vows to stick with trade diversification strategy despite U.S. pressure
data.description:
Canada is refusing to change course on trade, even as pressure ramps up from Washington. Foreign Minister Anita Anand said the government will keep pushing to reduce its reliance on the United States, despite fresh tariff threats from President Donald Trump. The message from Ottawa is that trade diversification stays on track, and outside pressure […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/canada-to-stick-with-trade-diversification/

data.title: Dogecoin Faces Key Test After Sharp Sell-Off and Rising Volatility
data.description:
Dogecoin is trading under renewed pressure as recent price action reflects a broader risk-off mood across the market. At the time of writing, DOGE is changing hands around $0. 119, following a prolonged decline that has unfolded over several sessions. While the asset is attempting a modest bounce, the overall structure remains fragile
source: https://www.ethnews.com/dogecoin-faces-key-test-after-sharp-sell-off-and-rising-volatility/

data.title: CME FedWatch Tool Indicates Low Probability of January Rate Cut
data.description: The CME FedWatch Tool reveals a 2.8% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in January. According to ChainCatcher, there is a 97.2% likelihood that rates will remain unchanged. By March, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut increases to 15.5%, while the chance of maintaining current rates is 84.1%. The likelihood of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut stands at 0.4%.

data.title: Match urgency to actual threats: a16z crypto tempers quantum headache
data.description:
Venture capital firm a16z crypto research partner and associate professor in the Department of Computer Science at Georgetown University, Justin Thaler, has urged the cryptocurrency industry to resist panic over quantum computing threats. The research partner argues that the timeline for cryptographically relevant quantum computers remains distant and that premature migration to post-quantum cryptography could […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/a16z-crypto-tempers-quantum-headache/

data.title: TRON Holds Key Support as Volatility Cools After Sharp Pullback
data.description:
TRON (TRX) is attempting to stabilize after a volatile week, with price action showing signs of consolidation near a key technical zone. As of the latest data, TRX is trading around $0. 295, following a period of heavy intraday swings and fading downside momentum. Short-term performance remains mixed
source: https://www.ethnews.com/tron-holds-key-support-as-volatility-cools-after-sharp-pullback/
